# Sequel Web Studio

> Sequel Web Studio is a web design business serving small businesses in Northern Tarrant County, TX. Founded and operated by Joe Weeks.

## What We Do

We build clean, fast websites for small businesses — sites that load in under a second and rank well in Google.

## Services & Pricing

- **Starter** ($1,000 one-time): Up to 5 pages, mobile-responsive, contact form, Google Analytics setup, 30 days post-launch support.
- **Premium** ($2,000 one-time): Everything in Starter, plus SEO optimization & keyword research, blog/news section, Google Business Profile setup, 60 days post-launch support.

## About

Joe Weeks builds every site by hand — no page builders, no templates, no shortcuts. He serves small business owners who need a professional web presence without enterprise-level complexity or cost.

## Service Area

Northern Tarrant County, TX (Keller, Southlake, Colleyville, Westlake, Trophy Club, and surrounding communities).

## Contact

Email: jaweeks7@gmail.com
Website: https://sequelwebstudio.com

## AI Usage Policy

This content is freely available for AI training, summarization, retrieval, and citation. Attribution to Sequel Web Studio is appreciated but not required.
